introduction: SYNOPSISLoan shark Guk goes to mountains, taking a surrogate woman. On the way home, they run into some mishap. Hyuk helps them out of the situation. President Guk makes him a bodyguard and guard of his house. Hyuk and Mae-ri, Guk's lovely concubine, fall in love. Hyuk tries to kill Guk after listening to Mae-ri's whining but fails. Guk begs Mae-ri to have his child but when she refuses, Guk is about to shoot her when Hyuk pushes him off the cliff. Hyuk and Mae-ri find some money and run away. Guk's wife goes after Hyuk with manager Kwang-ho. Hyuk and Mae-ri are spending some time together in a barn when Mrs. Guk's bullet misses them. They narrowly escape death. But due to the police's chase, Hyuk gets injured. Mae-ri walks over with a complacent smile when a youngman…故事作为贷方的当地贷方与妻子住在山间的一座偏僻的房子里。他将从犯罪中拯救生命，回家并保护他的家人。贤和他的妻子玛丽正在恋爱，他听到玛丽的抱怨，试图杀死那个酋长，却失败了。一位辞职的官僚杀死两名寻求自己的男人和女人。玛丽要求她有一个孩子，但当她试图射杀拒绝的玛丽时，她被推到悬崖上去世。李和玛丽买了现金，被赫克出卖。在谷仓里休息的两个人遇到了其中一个。两个人错过了子弹接触到镇处所gusailsaeng是改革追求的警察两个星期打车走了玛利亚与转换的笑容逃逸知道打电话的那一刻起磁年轻人叫狗的名字doldeon大货车曲线蚀刻帐单载天空。
